evidence_quotes.quote: Please consider also protecting video games as well.
Games are up to 90 a piece and our access to them is on the whims of the publisher.
As is the EULA of sold products dictate that the publisher may terminate already sold services on a whim.
In a nutshell we do not own the products we buy, which is leaves a bad taste in many consumer mouths.

paragraphs.text: Please consider also protecting video games as well. As is the EULA of sold products dictate that the publisher may terminate already sold services on a whim. In a nutshell we do not own the products we buy, which is leaves a bad taste in many consumer mouths. Games are up to 90 a piece and our access to them is on the whims of the publisher. There is a grassroots movement called "Stop killing games" going on in EU that tries to remedy this. Please help us.
